message: chore(beads): close bd-j19j6 (aarch64 cross-compile gate script)

 {"id":"bd-imwv","title":"Conformance: direct execute allocator fixture cases","description":"Add direct frankenlibc_fixture_exec coverage for allocator.json cases in the harness alongside existing isolated harness coverage.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SilverHarbor","created_at":"2026-04-18T10:37:10.281604078Z","created_by":"SilverHarbor","updated_at":"2026-04-18T10:41:22.053364549Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T10:41:22.051373321Z","close_reason":"Added direct execute_fixture_case coverage for allocator fixtures and verified with rch test/check/clippy.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["allocator","conformance","testing"]}
 {"id":"bd-it3q","title":"syscall: sched_rr_get_interval negative pid with null output should still return EINVAL exactly","description":"Host glibc returns EINVAL for sched_rr_get_interval(-1, NULL), so the invalid-pid contract dominates the null output pointer. Add ABI regression coverage for that precedence.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T08:49:26.219071865Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-22T01:47:58.160012842Z","closed_at":"2026-04-22T01:47:58.157875024Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-izz6","title":"syscall: getcpu all-null outputs should succeed without touching errno","description":"Host glibc returns success with unchanged errno for getcpu(NULL, NULL, NULL). Add focused ABI regression coverage so the veneer preserves that no-output success contract.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"AmberSignal","created_at":"2026-04-21T08:25:33.019393506Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-21T08:27:28.631252026Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T08:27:28.628933714Z","close_reason":"Locked down host-parity getcpu(NULL, NULL, NULL) behavior: success with unchanged errno and new ABI regression coverage; verified locally and via rch.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"bd-j19j6","title":"aarch64 raw syscall + clone-tail-args code paths have no CI cross-compile check","description":"## Defect

frankenlibc-core/src/syscall/raw.rs declares 10 aarch64 syscall0..
syscall6 blocks via #[cfg(target_arch = \"aarch64\")] and a separate
current_clone_tail_args variant for aarch64's different clone
argument order. frankenlibc-core/src/lib.rs and frankenlibc-abi/
src/lib.rs both gate compilation on cfg(any(x86_64, aarch64)), and
multiple closed beads (bd-10pq, bd-h5x) point to aarch64 as
'supported' / 'active bring-up'.

Reality check: there is no CI job, no cross-compile test, and no
deterministic gate script that actually compiles ANY crate for
aarch64. `rg --files | xargs -I _ rg 'aarch64'` only hits the
source-level cfg attrs — no workflow, no cross-build in scripts/,
no triple override in Cargo metadata.

If any of the 10 aarch64 syscall blocks has a typo or wrong
register constraint, we'd only notice when someone first tries
to build on an actual aarch64 host. Meanwhile, the bead closures
overstate current support.

## Fix

Add one of:
1. `scripts/check_aarch64_crosscompile.sh` that runs `cargo check
   --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu -p frankenlibc-core -p
   frankenlibc-abi` with the cross toolchain, as a deterministic
   gate that can run in CI.
2. A tests/conformance/ fixture that exercises clone-tail-args
   layout via a type-level compile check.

Option 1 is the minimal-scope fix — cross-compile check catches
register-constraint typos and missing cfg gates without needing
an aarch64 runner.

## Severity

[MEDIUM] (P2). No active exploitation — x86_64 is the primary
target and all known consumers use it. But the closure notes
on bd-10pq and bd-h5x claim aarch64 support without CI evidence,
so the first aarch64 consumer will hit avoidable breakage.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-23T16:56:50.661732236Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-23T16:56:50.661732236Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
